name: Owl's Nest Resort
about: Owl's Nest Resort is a full-service resort offering a comprehensive golf experience with both on-course play and indoor simulator facilities. The resort features the Vineyard Course and a dedicated golf simulator space known as SportsNest, equipped with 3D graphics and performance tracking technology. It caters to a range of guests, including those staying at the resort's various lodging options like the Lakeside Villas and Lafayette Lodge, as well as local members and visitors. The facility combines traditional golf amenities with modern simulator technology, providing an elevated indoor experience that allows play on over 80 courses.
why_golfers_like_it: Over 80 virtual courses available with stunning 3D graphics
Precision performance tracking technology for serious practice
Indoor simulators open daily, accessible year-round
Part of a resort hotel experience allowing for stay-and-play packages
On-site dining options available for a complete outing

food_and_drink.notes: On-site dining options include Panorama Six82, Slice Pizzeria & Sports Bar, Butch's Brooklyn Deli, and Pemi Burger Bar
Available at dining venues, Slice Pizzeria & Sports Bar mentions $4 Miller Lites

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium indoor simulator system with performance tracking (brand not specified)

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While the content doesn't specify, it's recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience. Rental clubs may be available but aren't mentioned on the website.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers on-site dining options including Slice Pizzeria & Sports Bar and Butch's Brooklyn Deli, suggesting that bringing outside food may not be permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The content doesn't specify timing, but indoor simulator sessions typically allow for 18 holes to be played in approximately 1-2 hours depending on the group size and pace.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the resort offers Junior Summer Camps and includes activities like the pool and family-friendly dining options, making it suitable for families.
